title: Start Cheering
writer: Eugene Solow, Richard Wormser, Philip Rapp
actors: Jimmy Durante, Walter Connolly, Joan Perry
plot: Fed up with movie life, film star Ted Crosley quits pictures to enroll in Midland College, much to the horror of his manager Sam Lewis and his stooge-friend Willie Gumbatz. Ted wishes to enroll in school under an assumed name but ...
